dtsPropsFor.SubscriptionCard: subscription: { id?: string; user_id?: string; status: "active" | "trialing" | "inactive" | "cancelled" | "past_due"; current_period_start: string | null; current_period_end: string | null } | null; /** Called when the user clicks "Subscribe"; host handles Stripe checkout. */ onSubscribe: () => Promise<{ error?: string }>; /** Called when the user clicks "Manage Subscription"; host opens the Stripe portal. */ onManage: () => Promise<{ error?: string }>
dtsPropsFor.ChartContainer: className?: string; id?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties; children?: React.ReactNode; /** Maps each data key to its label/icon/color (drives legend + tooltip + CSS color vars). */ config: Record<string, { label?: React.ReactNode; icon?: React.ComponentType; color?: string; theme?: Record<string, string> }>
dtsPropsFor.Carousel: className?: string; id?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties; children?: React.ReactNode; orientation?: "horizontal" | "vertical"; /** Embla options. */ opts?: Record<string, unknown>; /** Embla plugins. */ plugins?: unknown[]; /** Receives the Embla API once mounted. */ setApi?: (api: unknown) => void
dtsPropsFor.OtpForm: /** Request a one-time code for this email. */ onRequestCode: (email: string) => Promise<{ error?: string }>; /** Verify the emailed code. */ onVerify: (data: { email: string; code: string }) => Promise<{ error?: string }>; /** Back to the previous screen. */ onBack?: () => void; /** Brand title shown at the top. */ title?: string
